Hero.Title: Integrated Web and Application Development Solutions for Your Business
Hero.Description: We help transform your business digitally through scalable software development, intuitive design, and cutting edge technology

About.Title: About Us
About.Description: We are a startup focused on developing innovative software to simplify everyday life. Driven by a spirit of collaboration and creativity, we create digital solutions that are not only functional but also highly relevant to modern needs. With a team of dedicated individuals, we are committed to delivering technology that makes a real impact and remains accessible to everyone.
About.Description2: Additionally, we offer professional website development services and sell modern, user friendly UI/UX templates. We believe that visual appeal and user experience are the keys to success in the digital world, therefore every product we create is designed with detail, aesthetics, and user comfort as our top priorities. Combining creativity and technology, we are ready to be your digital partner, turning your ideas into tangible solutions.
About.Vision: To become a leading technology company that drives innovation and digital transformation globally.

FAQ.Title: FAQ &
FAQ.Subtitle: Service Information
FAQ.Description: Find answers to common questions or contact our team for a consultation.
FAQ.Question1: Why does my business need a website or dedicated app?
FAQ.Answer1: Websites and apps boost credibility, expand market reach, and allow your business to operate 24/7 without physical limits.
FAQ.Question2: How long does it take to complete a project?
FAQ.Answer2: Project timelines depend on complexity. Simple projects typically finish in 2–4 weeks, while complex systems may take 1–3 months.
FAQ.Question3: What about data security and post-launch maintenance?
FAQ.Answer3: We apply current security standards and offer maintenance packages to keep your app safe, stable, and up to date.
FAQ.Question4: Are there hidden fees beyond development costs?
FAQ.Answer4: No hidden fees. All costs are explained transparently before the project starts, including hosting, domain, and maintenance if needed.
FAQ.Question5: Can I request revisions if the result is not as expected?
FAQ.Answer5: Absolutely. We provide revision sessions agreed upon at the start of the project to ensure the final result meets expectations.
FAQ.Question6: How do I start a project consultation with Caruban Technology?
FAQ.Answer6: Contact us through the contact page or WhatsApp. Our team responds within 24 hours to discuss your project needs.
